title: Compact overview lane spacing and flatten 3D overview layers
description: Overview rendering now avoids excessive zone/layer separation: 2D overview uses tighter zone lane spacing, and 3D overview no longer raises nodes by semantic layer depth.
decision_notes: The observed Wiz/FirebaseAuth distance was caused by overview using wide zone swimlane gaps, not by layer lane mode.
Added LayoutOptions.laneGap so overview can use compact spacing while Stack/layer views keep their larger layout separation.
3D overview now flattens semantic layer height, matching the expectation that overview should be a composition view rather than a layer-stack view.
verification: Demo seed check: overview layout height is now 718px for the CDN demo sample, with Wiz/FirebaseAuth pulled upward while Stack remains layer-separated.
